cap: An OpenAI-API-compatible HTTP proxy (FastAPI) that routes chat completions to multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, local PyTorch models) by model-name pattern, with virtual API keys, group-based access control, load balancing, and streaming passthrough.
Reversi-playing agent using classical minimax search with AlphaBeta pruning and heuristic evaluation, plus supporting move-generation and game-state tooling.
MCP server exposing an input_user_prompt tool that pops a native GUI dialog (zenity/osascript) so a coding agent can request mid-generation input without ending its turn

A Rust CLI that runs transformer inference (Gemma-family) directly from a custom decomposed/flattened weight file format via mmap, on CPU or Vulkan GPU, without any ML framework (no PyTorch/CUDA), including an FFN-only ablation mode and an attention-sidecar extractor from HF safetensors.

a Rust control plane that runs and load-balances multiple HuggingFace Text-Embeddings-Inference instances on one GPU host behind a single gRPC/REST endpoint, with health checks, auto-restart, and metrics

a macOS Electron app that models a developer workspace as a stack of git worktrees (layers), running terminals or pluggable coding-agent drivers per layer, with commit-triggered restack, checkpoint snapshots, and diff review tied to ticket/PRD context
Rust/Axum server providing short-term, long-term (SQLite), and latent (ChromaDB) memory layers behind an HTTP API, plus a BaseAgent with a custom "Sentience" DSL and LLM chat fallback

A tool-augmented LLM pipeline (Codex/GPT-3.5) that answers gene/SNP/disease questions by generating and executing NCBI Eutils and BLAST API calls inline via a custom decoding loop, evaluated on the GeneTuring benchmark.

Claude Code plugin bundling three skills (blog drafting, team-advisor multi-agent review, daily work-report generation) plus subagents routed by task type (haiku/sonnet/opus) with a SessionStart hook injecting routing rules and a SubagentStart hook verifying actual vs expected model

Rust engine that trains and runs inference for transformer models directly on Apple Neural Engine + Metal GPU via reverse-engineered private ANE APIs, with checkpointing, KV-cache decode, and an OpenAI-compatible HTTP server.

A Rust edge-device agent runtime with a layered architecture (security/orchestrator/memory/event-bus/tools/channels), 6 LLM provider adapters with fallback chaining, SQLite FTS5+vector memory, and channel implementations (CLI, TCP, Telegram, MQTT) targeting Raspberry Pi-class devices.

A Claude Code plugin/slash command that runs deterministic gates plus ten parallel specialized review agents (security, DRY, consistency, performance, a11y/i18n, etc.) followed by an adversarial verifier pass, producing a severity-tiered report with file:line citations.
protoc plugin that generates Go model structs, repo interfaces, RDB implementations (xorm), HTTP handler scaffolding, and OpenAPI docs from protobuf files annotated with custom Cato options.

anti-detect browser automation workspace providing isolated fingerprinted browser profiles (Firefox/Camoufox, Chromium/CloakBrowser) controllable via web dashboard, REST API, MCP server (stdio/HTTP), Playwright-connect, and a Docker+KasmVNC remote-desktop deployment

Go Discord bot that binds channels to project directories and drives ACP-compatible coding-agent CLIs (Kiro or OMP) over stdio, with MCP tool policy/proxy, cron, audit, and thread-scoped agent sessions.

native Pi coding-agent extension that indexes a codebase/docs/PDFs into a local SQLite-backed hybrid (BM25 + dense vector) search index with AST-aware code chunking, cross-encoder reranking, incremental re-indexing via file watcher, and index-health diagnostics exposed as agent tools.

a natural-language ad-ops console where a Spring Boot backend, Vue admin UI, and a LangChain-based Python agent parse operator commands, generate ad-campaign strategies for Douyin/Xiaohongshu, and auto-monitor/alert on performance

A local browser UI that intercepts an agent's plan-mode output (Claude Code ExitPlanMode hook, OpenCode/Pi tool call), lets the user annotate the markdown plan with strikethrough/replace/insert/comment, and sends structured feedback back to the agent for revision before execution proceeds.

A self-hosted FastAPI + Next.js enterprise knowledge hub that ingests org documents through a plan-reviewed LLM compile pipeline into an interlinked, versioned wiki with department-scoped RBAC, then serves it to Claude/other LLMs as an OAuth-gated MCP server with wiki search/edit tools.
OpenCode plugin that manages multiple ChatGPT Plus/Pro OAuth accounts for Codex/GPT-5, rotating between them, running health checks, and surfacing quota/diagnostics in a terminal UI.

installable Claude Code 'skill' bundling reference docs and code patterns for the Go 'due' game-server framework (gate/node/mesh components), with an eval harness that grades AI-generated code with vs without the skill loaded.
Rust-based "agent OS" runtime (WASM channels, CodeAct execution) providing a sandboxed, extensible substrate for running AI agents with defined tool/skill boundaries and a gateway/event system.
NEAR-blockchain payment-channel infra letting users pay per-prompt for LLM completions via a proxy server that validates signed payment states before forwarding to providers
Go SDK that wraps Gemini genai/ADK calls and normalizes OpenTelemetry GenAI spans into a shared neatlogs.* attribute namespace, exported over OTLP

A local-first tool that ingests Claude Code/Codex/Cursor/opencode session transcripts and git history into a SurrealDB graph, runs a Stop-hook retro at session end, classifies friction patterns, and surfaces proposals/experiments (with t+7/30/90 verdicts) plus a dashboard of skill/cost/session metrics.

Elixir/OTP platform running swarms of LLM worker agents (coder, reviewer, researcher, test-runner) via pluggable 'Forge' runners (Claude Code, shell, custom, workflow), with GitHub webhook-triggered triage/PR/research coordinator agents, cron scheduling, and a solution-reputation store.

a multi-tenant Java/Spring Boot SaaS platform (Dify-inspired) for building RAG-backed agents with LangChain4j orchestration, containerized MCP tool management, document OCR+vectorization pipeline (PGVector), and agent versioning/publish/review workflow
RAG chatbot with a small ReAct-style tool-using agent (search/get_page/calculate tools over ChromaDB) answering student questions from an institution's handbook, served via FastAPI+React

personal automation that daily-scrapes arXiv AI-agent papers into a triage inbox, archives selected ones with note templates, and serves a web UI over the archive via GitHub Pages, plus a bundled library of reusable research/writing skills (literature review, citation management, OpenAlex/PubMed lookup)
MCP server exposing read/write/format/table/copy operations against .xlsx/.xlsm files, with paginated cell reads and, on Windows only, live in-app editing and screen capture via OLE automation.

terminal IDE where AI agents propose file edits that pass through an interactive AST-aware Write Gate before touching disk, with a DSL for composing multi-agent swarms across git worktrees and model tiers

Rust TUI/CLI that manages named config profiles (model, MCP servers, skills, agents) across 6 coding-agent harnesses (Claude Code, OpenCode, Goose, Amp, Copilot CLI, Crush) and translates/installs skills or MCP servers from any GitHub repo into each harness's own schema

A Go CLI+TUI that indexes local Claude Code/Codex/Copilot/OpenCode session logs into a searchable SQLite FTS5 database, with resume-in-terminal support and a built-in MCP server exposing search/list/get-messages tools.
a Claude Code skillset that takes one input image and generates 3D meshes (.glb/.obj), gaussian splats (.spz), and ambient/object SFX (.mp3) via chained calls to World Labs and FAL APIs

A service that pulls Linear issues, spins up an isolated Docker workspace per issue, runs a Cursor-ACP or Claude Code backend through a multi-turn pipeline with test feedback from an OpenSandbox interpreter, gates on human review, then auto-merges on green CI — with a TUI for monitoring and a subsystem that mines run history to patch/generate new Skills.
MCP server that lets Claude/Cursor/etc. drive FreeCAD via RPC: create/edit/delete CAD objects, set properties, run FEM analysis, screenshot the viewport, insert library parts.
A CLI script that connects an MCPAgent (via mcp-use) to a FreeCAD MCP server and drives it with a text prompt plus an optional reference image to generate a 3D model.

A Rust CLI that wraps git worktree to give AI coding agents isolated working directories per task, with a 'snap mode' that creates a worktree, launches the agent command, and interactively merges/cleans up afterward, plus config-driven pre/post hooks.
A Go multi-platform bot (Telegram/Slack/Discord) that summarizes linked webpages on command and can auto-recap subscribed group chat histories using OpenAI GPT models.
Kubernetes operator (with a kubectl-krew plugin, kollama) that manages custom Model resources, pulling and serving Ollama-backed LLMs on a cluster without manual pod/config wiring.
Runs GitHub Actions workflows locally in Docker containers by parsing .github/workflows and emulating the runner environment.

Go CLI that streams a project's directory tree and whitelisted source files (including Unreal Engine text assets like .uproject/.t3d/.usf) into one Markdown file for pasting into an LLM chat, using buffered line-by-line I/O to stay low-memory on huge repos.

turns a Claude Code session into a long-running project-lead orchestrator: decomposes a goal into parallel work, tracks a spend budget against quota, paces itself (Monte-Carlo ETA estimation), rotates across multiple accounts to avoid rate limits, and hooks-gate WIP per work board

A long-term memory library for LLM agents that segments multi-turn conversation into topic-coherent episodes (LLM-based boundary detection), distills semantic facts via a predict-then-calibrate loop, and exposes unified vector+text hybrid search over episodic + semantic stores.

Rust CLI + HTTP server that loads GGUF-format models (verified on LFM-2 architecture) and serves an OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint with streaming, tool/function calling, reasoning-token detection, and disk-backed KV-cache prefix caching.

A Spring Boot autoconfiguration that discovers SpringDoc OpenAPI operations at runtime and republishes them as MCP tools, adding a gateway layer: capability discovery, preflight argument validation, JSONPath response shaping, workflow planning/dry-run/execution, and guardrails (confirm flags, blocked paths, audit log).

Single-script offline CLI assistant running local GGUF models (llama-cpp-python) with modes for security recon/payload generation, code, and chat, plus local Stable Diffusion image gen and a persistent auth-aware URL-fetch agent.
collection of Claude/Codex/Gemini agent-skill packages (SKILL.md + Python scripts) teaching coding agents how to use Neo4j Aura provisioning, Cypher, graph analytics, and CLI tools correctly.
A Neo4j-backed memory library storing agent conversations as a knowledge graph with short/long-term memory tiers and an extraction benchmark suite.
a full-stack app (FastAPI backend, React frontend) that ingests unstructured docs (PDF/DOCX/YouTube/web) via LangChain+LLMs and constructs a queryable Neo4j knowledge graph with GraphRAG QA

MCP server plus lifecycle hooks that give a coding/product agent a Neo4j-backed graph memory: injects scoped prior learnings and decisions at session/prompt start, runs an LLM extraction pass at session end to distill new :Learning/:Decision nodes, and periodically consolidates accumulated user-profile memory into a versioned, frozen system prompt.

an experimental/canary MCP server exposing Neo4j Cypher read/write, schema introspection, and Graph Data Science procedures as MCP tools, with adaptive startup (works without GDS/APOC present) and STDIO/HTTP transport modes

Official Go-based MCP server exposing Neo4j graph databases to LLM clients: schema introspection, read/write Cypher execution with read-only enforcement via query classification, and GDS procedure listing.

TUI + CLI that reads on-disk session files (JSONL/SQLite) from Claude Code, Codex, Kiro, and opencode, merges them into one live tree showing per-session working/waiting state and sub-agent activity, plus a report/summary command that pipes a day's activity through whichever agent CLI is installed.

A marketplace of Claude Code/OpenCode/Cursor plugins packaging prompt techniques as skills/agents/commands: spec-driven development (Arc42-based), subagent-driven multi-agent patterns (do-in-parallel, judge-with-debate, tree-of-thoughts), reflexion (reflect/memorize hooks), DDD/TDD rule injection, and MCP setup helpers.

A mature JS UI framework (worker-based rendering engine) whose repo also hosts 'the Brain': an in-house multi-agent engineering system with a SQLite-backed knowledge graph (Native Edge Graph), multiple MCP servers (memory-core, knowledge-base, github-workflow, neural-link), cross-model (Claude/Gemini/GPT) agent orchestration, and a 'Neural Link' bridge letting agents inspect and mutate the running app's live runtime state.

MCP server exposing the full ElevenLabs API surface (TTS, STT, voice cloning/design, sound effects, music, audio isolation, dubbing, account/history management) as 28 callable tools for Claude Code and other MCP clients.
Remote/local MCP server exposing Neon Postgres project/branch management and SQL execution as MCP tools, with OAuth and API-key auth and scoped tool grants.
a serverless Postgres platform separating storage/compute, with a custom storage engine (pageserver + safekeepers) enabling autoscaling, scale-to-zero, and instant copy-on-write database branching
Claude Code skill that runs an interview → SVG concept generation → iterative refinement → PNG export workflow for logo design, with a scripted multi-tool SVG-to-PNG export pipeline.

Streamlit dashboard where seven specialized agents (technical, fundamental, sentiment, industry/macro, ESG, fund-flow, chief-strategy) analyze a stock and a coordinator merges their outputs into an investment report with charts.

LangGraph-based multi-agent pipeline that parses arbitrary-format screenplays into shot-level breakdowns and emits text-to-video prompts for Sora/Veo/Kling, with character/scene continuity via vector retrieval and A2A/MCP/REST interfaces.

a Flask service that takes a text instruction plus uploaded video clips and runs a LangGraph-orchestrated pipeline (speech recognition, scene/object detection, emotion analysis) to select, cut, and merge clips into one output video

converts any OpenAPI 3.x spec into an MCP server exposing only 3 generic tools (get_service_info, get_type_info, make_api_request) backed by a build-time-generated catalog, instead of one MCP tool per API endpoint

A Chinese-language whitepaper/reference manual analyzing Claude Code's internal architecture (state/service/tool/session layering, permission system, hooks, multi-agent coordination, MCP integration, memory/skills) and distilling it into design principles for building agent systems.
A CLI coding agent (npm-installable) supporting interactive and headless modes, multi-provider auth, MCP, and skills/commands directories for extending its own workflow.

cross-session memory plugin for the Pi coding agent that binds facts into holographic (HRR) vectors for fast local recall, plus a Telegram/WhatsApp gateway that proactively messages users via cron/heartbeat

trains diffusion models (DDPM and mixed discrete-continuous) over 3D robotic scene layouts, post-trained with RL (DDPO/score-function) and searched at inference time (MCTS/inpainting) to steer generation toward language-specified or physically valid scenes.

Rust daemon + CLI + MCP server that lets AI agents start/stop/monitor long-running dev processes (dev servers, watchers) while giving developers full CLI visibility into the same processes, with regex log search and wait-for-log-pattern readiness checks
CLI tool for local roleplay chat against an Ollama-served LimaRP-format model, letting a user define multiple human-played characters and one AI-played character with a scenario
A modular NeRF/Gaussian-splatting training and viewing framework with pluggable pipelines, dataparsers, and a real-time web viewer.

backend-agnostic Rust GUI framework (Elm architecture) where every widget exposes a semantic ontology (schema, capabilities, actions) queryable/controllable by an AI agent over a JSON-Lines or WebSocket protocol, without screen-scraping

Rust TUI framework (Elm-architecture, double-buffered rendering) where every widget implements a Discoverable trait exposing schema, capabilities, actions and state as JSON, plus an RPC/headless-driver protocol for agent control

custom binary wire-protocol/transport stack (not HTTP) positioned as a full "agentic web stack": streaming, capability handshakes, multi-agent swarm/mesh coordination, MCP/gRPC/OpenAI-compatible bridges

Go MCP server exposing OpenStreetMap-backed geospatial tools to LLMs: geocoding, routing (via OSRM), nearby-places/EV-charging/school/parking search, neighborhood livability scoring, and meeting-point suggestion.

A browser/mobile web UI (three-panel: sessions, chat, workspace file browser) for driving the Nous Research Hermes autonomous agent that otherwise runs headless on a server, with its own MCP server for session/project management.

Claude Code plugin providing deterministic gate-check scripts (AC lint, milestone tracking, drift predicates, archive/frontmatter validators) that enforce spec-driven-development and TDD workflow steps across TS/Flutter/Python projects, plus bounded self-review loop skills.

a Rust MCP server template supporting 6 transports (stdio/SSE/WebSocket/HTTP/HTTP-stream/gRPC), OAuth2.1 + JWT auth, elicitation, sampling-with-tools, task management, and a PostgREST-backed database tool, plus auto-generated client SDKs in 4 languages

an MCP server exposing NetApp ONTAP storage cluster operations (volume/snapshot/export-policy/QoS/NFS/CIFS lifecycle management across multiple clusters) as tools for LLM clients like Claude Desktop and Copilot.
read-only MCP server exposing NetBox's DCIM/IPAM objects, changelogs and plugin-discovered types to LLM clients via filtered get_objects/get_object_by_id tools
.NET-based self-hosted agent daemon (netclawd) run in Docker as an unprivileged user, with a CLI launcher and a behavioral eval suite testing identity, memory, tool use, and grounding.
Real-time infrastructure metrics collection agent (C/Go) with dashboards, alerting, and now MCP integration for AI-queryable observability data.

A new systems programming language and toolchain (compiler, LSP, package manager, bindgen) with ownership/borrow-checking, LLVM backend, cross-compilation to iOS/Android/ESP32, and a resolved typed code-knowledge graph queryable via CLI, LSP, or a resident MCP server.

Electron desktop app that runs an OpenClaw-based coding/office agent locally with real tool execution (data analysis, slide/doc generation, video, web research) and accepts remote commands via WeChat/Feishu/DingTalk/Telegram bridges.
self-hosted local-knowledge-base RAG system: ingests PDF/Word/PPT/Excel/images/CSV/web via OCR+layout-aware parsing, two-stage vector+rerank retrieval, cross-lingual Q&A over uploaded docs

Production-grade workflow-as-a-service orchestrator (DAG scheduling, SLO-bound execution, pluggable signal/trigger backends including SQS/SNS) that runs hundreds of thousands of data/ML workflows daily at Netflix.
Workflow/DAG framework for defining, versioning, and deploying data science and ML pipelines across compute backends (AWS, K8s, GCP).
Minimalist sparse-data neural network library written in D, targeting single-machine training of sparse logistic regression and similar models.

video inpainting model that removes objects from video along with their physical interaction effects (e.g. object falling when the person holding it is removed), via a two-pass CogVideoX-based diffusion pipeline with VLM-driven mask generation

reconstructs AI-agent/LLM traffic (turns, tool calls, latency, throughput) purely from network packet captures (pcap or live TLS-boundary capture) with zero SDK/proxy changes, feeding a live dashboard.

Go MCP server exposing 14 IP-geolocation/timezone/subnet tools (some local-only, no API call) plus 4 guided prompts, working unauthenticated (country-level) or with an API key (city-level + account management).

a meta-skill defining and validating the standard repository layout, licensing, packaging, and CI conventions Netresearch uses across its many Claude Code skill repos, plus scripts to scaffold/validate/migrate repos to that standard
TYPO3 CMS extension providing one shared LLM provider configuration (Anthropic/Gemini/GPT/Ollama), embeddings, and streaming for all other extensions on a TYPO3 site to consume.
Read-only terminal UI that polls a companion 'multi-agent-starter' project's task/worker files every 2s and displays worker status, logs, and artifacts.
Detects when an AI agent cites a web source, attributes it to a registered creator, and settles a USDC nanopayment to them via Circle Gateway/x402 on the Arc chain.
local-first CLI that crawls target companies' career pages, extracts job postings into SQLite via source adapters, and exposes stable JSON output for coding agents (Codex/Claude Code) to query

defines and serves a rail-agnostic JSON payment manifest (`mcp-pay.json`) at a well-known MCP endpoint, plus a reference Rust server implementing HTTP-402-gated tool calls over x402, with Lightning/MPP/card rails specified but unimplemented.

standardizes disparate agent-trajectory datasets (coding, web browsing, GUI/mobile) into a common interchange format (ATIF) and converts them into SFT training data for specific agent architectures (OpenHands, SWE-agent, AgentLab)
annotates PDF papers by using an LLM to extract key concepts, running an embeddings search per page to find supporting text, and highlighting/annotating the PDF with generated topic labels
All-in-one framework combining vector embeddings/ANN search, RAG pipelines, LLM orchestration workflows, and an agent module, with API and MCP support.
on-device, LLM-backbone text-to-speech with instant voice cloning (3s reference audio) via a small speech-LM + neural codec, quantized to GGUF for phones/Pis/laptops

a local-first Python toolkit that parses NeuraDock 7-channel EEG hardware streams, computes quality-gated visual-cognitive-load metrics (alpha suppression/asymmetry), serves them over a local API/dashboard, and optionally routes natural-language requests to a fixed set of analysis workflows via an allowlisted LLM planner

A WhatsApp chatbot agent (LangGraph-style) with voice transcription/synthesis, image recognition, and simulated daily-activity narrative, deployed via Chainlit UI and Cloud Run, taught as a step-by-step course.
A game engine where LangGraph agents impersonate historical philosophers with RAG-grounded persona knowledge, playable via a JS front-end, with a companion evaluation/dataset pipeline.

Desktop/server cockpit around the OpenCode CLI providing multi-instance session workspaces, git worktrees, remote access with TLS/auth, voice input, sidecars (embed other local web tools as tabs), and rich tool-call rendering.
a Windows desktop GUI running 7 role-specialized local LLM agents (supervisor/planner/coder/debugger/vision/tester/auditor) over a shared message bus with a live app-render simulator

a Claude Code plugin that turns natural-language prompts into validated n8n automation workflows: agents research node parameters against a 537+ node schema index, write/validate TypeScript workflow definitions, deploy them to a live n8n instance, and test them end-to-end.
Go library providing a composable operation/provider abstraction for chaining LLM calls (chat, RAG, image/speech-to-text, function calling) via OpenAI.

a cross-agent (Claude Code, Codex, Copilot CLI) marketplace of plugins for academic research workflows: literature search, grant writing, manuscript prep, and scientific figure generation/QA with automated font and raster/SVG validation scripts.

a PHP component that runs multi-turn conversational data collection against a user-defined structured-output class, tracking missing fields, validation errors, completion percentage, and an optional confirm-before-submit interrupt step
A PHP deep-research agent that plans report sections, generates search queries, performs web searches, and assembles a structured multi-section report, built as a workflow on the Neuron AI framework.
A GraphRAG retrieval strategy module for the Neuron PHP AI framework that converts natural-language queries to Cypher and retrieves from a Neo4j graph store alongside vector retrieval.

a Laravel demo app that runs a multi-agent travel-planning workflow (delegator + specialist agents/nodes for flights, hotels, places) using the Neuron PHP AI framework and SerpAPI for data, rendered via Livewire chat.
Trains small pure-PHP logistic-regression classifiers that score prompt difficulty (0-1) per task category from embeddings, for feeding into an LLM router without any Python/GPU dependency.

a full CLI coding-agent harness written in PHP: tool-approval middleware, TUI with diff rendering, extension/plugin system (tools, inline commands, memories), multi-provider LLM support, and MCP integration.

A PHP agentic framework providing LLM provider abstraction, tool/agent orchestration, workflow graphs with interrupt/resume, vector store integration, and an observability/inspector UI, positioned as the production agent framework for the PHP ecosystem.
Laravel integration package for the Neuron AI framework: artisan generators for agents/tools/workflows/RAG, Eloquent-backed chat history migrations, and provider/embedding facades.
the documentation site source for Neuron, a PHP agentic-application framework covering agents, tools, RAG, multi-agent workflows, and observability
PHP library implementing RAPTOR hierarchical clustering/retrieval (tree-node summarization + GMM or similarity clustering) as a pluggable retrieval strategy for the Neuron PHP agent framework.
a performance-optimized BPE tokenizer library for PHP, loading pretrained GPT-2 vocab/merges files and encoding/decoding text with caching and priority-queue optimization
an example travel-planning agent built on the Neuron PHP workflow engine, using SerpAPI tools to research flights/hotels/places and interactive CLI human-in-the-loop interrupts

A collection of Claude Code skill/rule markdown files and slash-command configs implementing a fixed orchestrator-plus-dynamic-subagent workflow with cross-model (Claude/GPT/Gemini) 'dispute' consultation via MCP

A self-hosted Flask chat app supporting multiple LLM providers (DeepSeek/OpenRouter/MiniMax), persistent SQLite-backed conversation memory, local ChromaDB RAG, OCR/vision multimodal input, an interactive canvas document workspace, and a large agent tool catalog with context-pruning.
Python SDK + CLI for creating cryptographic "Cell" identities and exchanging encrypted messages/files over a custom Neuronum network protocol, with an MCP wrapper (mcp.py) exposing it as tools.

CLI/library that parses an OpenAPI spec and renders it into structured Agent Skills markdown (SKILL.md + references/resources, operations, schemas) grouped by tags or path, with filtering, case-collision handling, and an assets-overlay mechanism for hand-authored content.

Event-sourced memory system storing agent session history as an immutable event ledger, replayed through versioned schema upcasters into deterministic projections (memory, knowledge graph, context) served via MCP/CLI/REST to Claude, Cursor, OpenCode, etc.

A curated, fact-checked collection of source-code teardowns (architecture diagrams in D2 + written analysis) of 15+ real-world AI coding agents, comparing internals like context management, tool execution, and sandboxing across products.

Agent memory system that compiles conversations/documents/media/tool traces into human-readable Markdown files (INDEX/MEMORY/SKILL) which agents selectively load, with multi-provider LLM/VLM/embedding client pooling.

Go CLI/bot/MCP-server tool that logs into a specific Indonesian carrier's (Telkomsel) account API to check balance, buy packages, and read OTP/SMS, exposed via Telegram, terminal, or an MCP server for AI agents.

A multi-agent orchestration platform where agents connect to a central JWT-authenticated tool-call bridge (beads-bridge) backed by Dolt/Postgres/Qdrant/NATS; a coordinator service scores and assigns tasks to agents, tracks memory via hybrid BM25+vector search, and builds a knowledge graph from agent outputs.

Cross-platform (Windows-native, no WSL) operating-system layer for Kimi CLI: 13 role-specific subagents, 22 slash commands, 11 lifecycle hooks (bash-command guard, pre-write backups, completeness gates, session verdict logging) implemented in Python, plus a library of 1,743 domain-knowledge skill markdown files.

A Go framework for building single agents, multi-agent networks (with supervision policies and dynamic spawning), and DAG-based workflows, with built-in Graph RAG, unified long-term memory, prompt caching, suspend/resume, and an A2A protocol client/server, all against raw net/http provider clients (no SDK lock-in).

Go CLI + daemon that dispatches many parallel Claude Code agent sessions into isolated git worktrees, tracks work as SQLite-backed "writs", auto-restarts crashed/stalled sessions, and merges completed branches through configurable quality gates.
Java Spring Boot backend that proxies text-to-image requests to a local ComfyUI instance and chat requests to Ollama, tracking task queues over WebSocket with a MySQL/Redis-backed user/fund system.

A hash-chained, causally-ordered (HLC) append-only event ledger that ingests coding-agent tool-call events via MCP or session-log adapters (Claude Code, Codex, Grok), letting workspace state be replayed or rewound to any prior sequence point via git read-tree snapshots.
Rust crate using the candle framework to load and run CPU-quantized inference for the SOLAR/DataVortex 10.7B LLM via GGUF weights

A daily-scheduled pipeline that scrapes GitHub Trending, picks 2-3 AI/dev-tool repos, generates self-contained HTML hero/landing-page design mockups in a rotating visual style, screenshots them, and rebuilds a catalog/gallery site from the accumulated corpus.

an Android BYOK LLM chat client supporting 8+ providers plus local llama.cpp inference, tree-structured non-linear conversations, agentic tool calling (web search, code execution, remote shell via a custom E2E-encrypted protocol), and on-device RAG
GPU-accelerated differentiable physics simulation engine for robotics (built on NVIDIA Warp + MuJoCo Warp), supporting rigid/soft/cloth/MPM/cable simulation, USD import, and multiple solver backends

A Python CLI (Typer-based) for generating, editing, diagnosing, versioning, and YAML-suite-testing system prompts, with an eval harness supporting rule/schema/LLM-judge evaluators and a memory-backed REPL.

a Claude Code/Codex Skill (Korean-language) that appends a structured 6-section 'why' explanation card after every coding action — tech choice, rationale, mechanism deep-dive, alternatives, and further-learning links — with merge rules to avoid card spam

Deterministic Python control plane that runs a pre-planned coding iteration end-to-end: invokes an implementer agent, enforces diff gates, requires a cross-model-family reviewer agent, does guarded merges, then multi-reviewer QA and retrospective, with event-sourced crash-recoverable state.

A multi-agent "office" runtime that spins up and coordinates several coding-agent backends (Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, OpenCode, local LLMs) as named roles (CEO, PM, engineer, designer) sharing context/knowledge graph, with a Go CLI and desktop app.

GPU-rendered terminal emulator that hosts AI agents over a stdio JSON-RPC protocol (SAP), scores commands for destructive risk before execution, and renders structured data (tables/JSON) from a companion shell.

Claude Code plugin + shell script that migrates a local Claude Code setup (skills, agents, memory, settings, MCP config) onto a remote 'Secure Agent Box' via rsync/ssh, verifies completeness, and separately provides a HIBP-checked KeePass password cleaner for the manual secrets handoff.

a Go MCP gateway that reads one JSON config per upstream API, exposes only the declared endpoints as MCP tools bound to a prefix-scoped SSE (or stdio) endpoint, injecting upstream auth server-side and rejecting client header overrides of protected headers
open-source clone of v0/Lovable: an AI-driven web app builder that generates and deploys full Next.js apps to Cloudflare Workers from natural-language prompts.
A Claude Code plugin marketplace shipping one skill that teaches an agent how to drive the AgentWiki CLI and MCP server for docs/knowledge-graph operations.

A Go reimplementation of OpenClaw as a multi-tenant AI agent gateway: PostgreSQL-backed, WebSocket-based, with 20+ LLM providers, 7 chat-channel integrations (Discord/Telegram/etc.), 5-layer security isolation, and native concurrency for running many agent teams at scale.
installable CLI + Claude/Codex/Cursor-compatible skill pack that injects design-system intelligence (brand tokens, component specs, layout rules) into coding-agent sessions for UI/UX generation.
